A range of acoustic solutions for every space

Made from polyester fiber, plain acoustic panels are great for decoration alongside its excellent performance sound absorbance, negating mid to high frequency sounds. Our panels are flame retardant, heat insulated, anti-mildew, easy to cut with no harmful chemicals.
